evals.prompt: I have an MCP server on Vercel using mcp-handler. I need to add OAuth authentication so users can log in with their Spotify account before using the tools. Set up the full auth flow.
evals.expected_output: Creates all OAuth endpoints (discovery, register, authorize, callback, token), uses withMcpAuth, adds Redis token storage, includes redirect_uri validation for Claude and Smithery

evals.prompt: My MCP server needs user authentication. Users should log in with GitHub OAuth before they can use any tools. The server is on Vercel with Next.js. I need the complete OAuth PKCE flow.
evals.expected_output: Creates the double OAuth architecture (server for MCP clients + client for GitHub), all well-known endpoints, dynamic client registration, withMcpAuth with required: false, Redis schema
